_comment: OPTIONAL. Gemini, Codex and Copilot client ids are already bundled in the app, so you only need this file to (a) sign into Claude in-app (its id is not bundled) or (b) override a bundled id with your own. Copy it to ~/.quotapanel/oauth-clients.json (macOS), ~/.config/quotapanel/oauth-clients.json (Linux), or %APPDATA%\quotapanel\oauth-clients.json (Windows) and keep only the entries you need. Precedence: env var > this file > bundled default. See README -> 'OAuth client configuration'. Git-ignored; never commit the filled-in copy.
